name: /measure-rubric: prompts operator "real issue? (y/n/skip)" for each rule firing
command: echo "y" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --interactive --n 1 2>&1 | grep -q "real issue?" && echo ok >&2
setup: git init -q && git config user.email t@t && git config user.name t && echo x>f && git add f && git commit -q -m c
